ranked_matches.title: PSL 2026: Lahore Qalandars vs Hyderabad Kingsmen

summary: The Sheffield Shield Final between Victoria and South Australia is underway today, March 26, 2026. The opening match of the PSL 2026 between Lahore Qalandars and Hyderabad Kingsmen is also scheduled for today, with the toss expected around 1:30 PM UTC.
